# 0103 Fix spec.md placeholder text to match spec

**Area:** cli-init

## Problem

The `SpecPlaceholder` constant in `src/scriptorium/init.nim` does not match the required text from the spec (Section 1).

Current value:
```
# Spec

This file will be generated by `scriptorium plan` using the Architect.
The Architect reads your AGENTS.md to understand the project before building the spec.
```

Required value (from spec):
```
# Spec

Run `scriptorium plan` to build your spec with the Architect.
```

## Task

1. In `src/scriptorium/init.nim`, change the `SpecPlaceholder` constant to exactly:
   ```nim
   SpecPlaceholder = "# Spec\n\nRun `scriptorium plan` to build your spec with the Architect.\n"
   ```
2. Run `make test` to confirm nothing breaks.

## Files

- `src/scriptorium/init.nim` (line ~8, `SpecPlaceholder` constant)

**Worktree:** /workspace/.scriptorium/worktrees/tickets/0111-0103-fix-specmd-placeholder-text-to-match-spec

## Prediction
- predicted_difficulty: trivial
- predicted_duration_minutes: 4
- reasoning: Single constant string change in one file with exact replacement text provided, no logic changes.

## Agent Run
- Model: claude-opus-4-6\n- Backend: claude-code\n- Exit Code: 0\n- Attempt: 1\n- Attempt Count: 1\n- Timeout: none\n- Log File: /workspace/.scriptorium/logs/coder/0111/attempt-01.jsonl\n- Last Message File: /workspace/.scriptorium/logs/coder/0111/attempt-01.last_message.txt\n
### Agent Last Message
```text
Done. Changed the `SpecPlaceholder` constant in `src/scriptorium/init.nim:8` to match the spec text. All tests pass.
```

## Review
**Review:** approved
- Model: claude-opus-4-6
- Backend: claude-code
- Exit Code: 0
- Wall Time: 18s

**Review Reasoning:** The diff is a single-line change to the `SpecPlaceholder` constant, updating it from the old two-line description to the exact text required by the spec (Section 1) and the ticket:

```
"# Spec\n\nRun `scriptorium plan` to build your spec with the Architect.\n"
```

**Convention enforcement:** No violations. The constant uses PascalCase, is in a grouped `const` block, and no imports/procs/comments were changed.

**Spec compliance:** The new value exactly matches the spec Section 1 requirement: `# Spec`, blank line, `` Run `scriptorium plan` to build your spec with the Architect. ``

**Code quality:** No dead code, no unused imports, no unrelated changes.
Approved. The change is correct, minimal, and matches both the ticket and spec exactly.

## Merge Queue Success
- Summary: Updated SpecPlaceholder constant in src/scriptorium/init.nim to match the spec: "Run `scriptorium plan` to build your spec with the Architect."\n
